subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Abhá Beauty! Consider what grace hath been bestowed upon you and what bounty ye have attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء جمال ابهی ملاحظه نمااید که مورد چه عنایتی شدید و موفق بچه موهبتی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @twin Manifestations, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer, @spiritual transformation
